summary.zh-CN: 本版本修复运行时更新提示、版本说明入口、聊天引用菜单和可视化结果生成指引。
summary.en-US: This release fixes runtime update prompts, release-note entry points, chat reference menus, and visual result guidance.

body.zh-CN: 当前运行版本仍可通过版本号查看说明，可用更新的说明入口保留在下载或更新按钮的悬停与键盘聚焦区域。
body.en-US: The current version still links from the version label, while available-update notes stay inside the download or update control's hover and keyboard-focus surface.

title.zh-CN: 可视化输出指引更清楚

body.zh-CN: Agent 会在结果适合展示时优先选择 Markdown、Mermaid、图片或内联 HTML，并减少完成后的重复文字。
body.en-US: Agents can choose Markdown, Mermaid, images, or inline HTML for visual results and reduce repeated text around completed output.

title.zh-CN: 运行时更新错误更明确

body.zh-CN: 更新后的后续检查会区分检查、下载和应用失败，并展示完整原因与日志命令。
body.en-US: Follow-up checks distinguish check, download, and apply failures, with the full reason and log command shown.

title.zh-CN: 聊天引用菜单高亮恢复正确

body.zh-CN: 重新进入“文件与文件夹”时会从第一行开始高亮，文件面板切换目录或搜索结果时也保持稳定高度。
body.en-US: Re-entering Files and folders starts highlight from the first row, and the file panel keeps a stable height while switching directory or search results.

body.zh-CN: NPM 安装用户可以继续通过 stable 更新链路，或重新安装 nextclaw@latest。
body.en-US: NPM users can continue through the stable update path or reinstall nextclaw@latest.
